LanguageData.MapGenAI_NoResponse: No response. Please check your API key.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_ParamsSaved: MapGen AI: Parameters saved. They will be applied when you start the map.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_ModifyHint: Press the button below to generate, or modify via chat.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_DialogCancelled: Dialog cancelled — parameters reset, preview restored
LanguageData.MapGenAI_Welcome:
Describe the map you want!

Examples:
 - "Diagonal mountain range with central lake"
 - "Mountain fortress with hot springs"
 - "Straight river on the left side"
 - "Clean flatland with marble only"
 - "Just recommend something"
LanguageData.MapGenAI_PresetLoadedMsg: Loaded preset "{0}".\nHills={1}, Amount={2}, Trees={3}, Animals={4}, River={5}, Caves={6}, Geysers={7}
LanguageData.MapGenAI_OdysseyRequired: (Special terrain features require the Odyssey DLC. Without Odyssey, mutators like lakes/hot springs/fjords are unavailable.)
LanguageData.MapGenAI_NoMutatorsAvailable: (No special terrain features available for this tile)
LanguageData.MapGenAI_MutatorNotFound: [!] '{0}' is not a valid terrain feature and was removed.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_MutatorCoastalOnly: [!] [{0}] is only available on coastal tiles and was removed.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_MutatorRiverOnly: [!] [{0}] is only available on tiles with a river and was removed.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_Settings_SimpleDesc: Uses gemini-2.5-flash by default. Free tier available.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_Settings_CloudServiceDesc: Use online AI services such as Google AI and OpenAI. Requires internet and an API key.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_Settings_LocalServiceDesc: Use a local AI server (Ollama, LM Studio, etc.) running on your computer. Must support OpenAI API.
LanguageData.MapGenAI_Settings_CloudConfigDesc: If multiple APIs are enabled, the system tries them in order. If one fails, the next is tried automatically.
